episodes.title: Trump’s DOJ Said the Epstein Case was Over. This is What They’re Hiding.
episodes.description:
The Epstein files are raising new questions about Melania Trump and why she suddenly decided to publicly deny any close relationship with Jeffrey Epstein…

That’s why Tara McGowan sat down with investigative journalist Nina Burleigh, to unpack the hidden history connecting Donald Trump, Melania Trump, Jeffrey Epstein, Paolo Zampolli and the New York modeling world of the 1990s.

Nina has spent years reporting on Epstein, Trump and Melania’s past so she understands, better than anyone, why Melania’s recent White House press conference may have created more questions than answers. Nina digs into the gaps in Melania’s early biography, the modeling pipeline that brought young Eastern European women to New York and the powerful men who operated in that world.

Tara and Nina also break down the story of Amanda Ungaro, Paolo Zampolli’s former partner, who told Nina she knows more about Melania’s past and what the First Lady may be trying to keep hidden… 

Subscribe to @COURIERHQ for more videos like this
Follow Tara mcGowan on Instagram: @taramcgowanri
Check out Nina’s latest interview with Amanda Ungaro here: https://www.americanfreakshow.news/p/the-woman-who-knows-too-much-an-interview

episodes.title: NEW: Details Of Bill Gates and Epstein's SECRET Relationship To Be Revealed By Probe
episodes.description:
The Gates Foundation has now launched an external review into Bill Gates’ ties to Jeffrey Epstein, just weeks before he’s set to testify before Congress. This means that while Gates is already facing scrutiny from lawmakers, his own foundation is trying to assess how much damage Epstein may have done behind the scenes.

According to the foundation’s CEO, the review will look at the organization’s past engagement with Epstein and examine how it vets philanthropic partnerships. Gates is preparing to testify before the House Oversight Committee on June 10. His spokesperson says he insists he never witnessed or participated in Epstein’s crimes, but with each new document released, what used to just a few bad meetings about philanthropy now looks more like a years long personal and financial relationship. Kat Tenbarge of Spitfire News dives into what we do and don't know about Epstein's connection to Gates, what Gates has admitted to vs. what the new probe intends to discover, and what we might expect to come from the House Oversight Committee this summer. 

SUBSCRIBE to  @COURIERHQ  for more.

#Epstein #EpsteinFiles #BillGates #JeffreyEpstein

episodes.title: SHOCKING: Republicans Weigh PARDONING Ghislaine Maxwell In Epstein Investigation
episodes.description:
House Oversight members are now openly debating whether Trump should pardon Ghislaine Maxwell in exchange for her testimony on the Epstein case. Maxwell is currently the only person actually convicted in the entire Epstein network, and her legal team is saying she will only cooperate if she gets clemency. This comes as House Republicans are being accused of changing how the Oversight Committee operates to avoid advancing the Epstein investigation.

Kat Tenbarge of Spitfire News has all the details of the discussions coming from within the White House and beyond, including how even the Republican chair of the committee admitted that the move would look bad, referring to Maxwell as one of the worst people involved in Epstein's crime ring.
Democrats are of course saying this would be a massive coverup, and if Trump does grant clemency, Maxwell will have every incentive to say he wasn't involved — despite all evidence to the contrary.

SUBSCRIBE to  @COURIERHQ  for more.

#Epstein #EpsteinFiles #GhislainMaxwell #JeffreyEpstein #DonaldTrump #Trump

episodes.title: BOMBSHELL REPORT: Witness Claims Melania Trump Had Direct Connection To Epstein
episodes.description:
A woman named Amanda Ungaro, who has known Donald and Melania Trump for decades, is now coming forward with new claims tied to the Jeffrey Epstein network. In a bombshell interview released by COURIER Newsroom correspondents Nina Burleigh and Katie Chenoweth this past Saturday, Ungaro revealed that she personally witnessed what she calls “highly compromising interactions” over a 20-year period.

Ungaro, a former model and ex of Paolo Zampolli, Trump's former business partner and “Special Envoy for Global Partnerships”, spent years within close proximity to both Trump and Melania. Supposedly Zampolli made a call this year that apparently resulted in Ungaro being deported by ICE, a move that looks much more calculated in light of her claims. This also comes right after Melania publicly denied any connection to Epstein, and threatened legal action against people spreading claims otherwise. That statement now looks a lot less random and more like a direct response to Ungaro’s allegations.

Kat Tenbarge of Spitfire News dives into this developing story, breaking down all of Ungaro's claims and the evidence available to back them up, how Zampolli has contributed to Trump & Melania's rise to power, and how the Epstein investigation could further expand if Ungaro testifies before the House.

This story is part of our project The Cover-Up: extended coverage designed to uncover the crimes within the Epstein files, and shed light on one of the biggest cover-ups by the federal government in history. To read the original interview from COURIER Newsroom, "The Woman Who Knew Too Much", click here: https://epsteincoverup.us/report/the-woman-who-knows-too-much-an-ungaro/ 

SUBSCRIBE to  @COURIERHQ  for more.

#MelaniaTrump #Melania #Epstein #EpsteinFiles #JeffreyEpstein #Trump #DonaldTrump #AmandaUngaro  #Politics

episodes.title: BREAKING: Epstein Cohorts Paid $1B To Hide Their Sex Trafficking Empire. We Dug It Back Up.
episodes.description:
A new report reveals that banks, powerful individuals, and global institutions connected to Jeffrey Epstein have collectively paid over $1 billion in settlements in order to avoid going to trial over their alleged roles in his sex trafficking operation. Examples include J.P. Morgan, Bank of America, Prince Andrew, Deutsche Bank, Leon Black, and more. At the same time, the Trump administration is continuing to claim there is not enough evidence to pursue broader criminal investigations into Epstein’s network. 

Despite all involved denying any wrongdoing, the money tells a different story about just how much they wanted to avoid scrutiny. This is over a billion dollars paid out to victims and almost every single one of these institutions and individuals settled right before trial, which is usually when evidence would become public. Mason of @onehandpolitics dives into which people, companies, and institutions are involved, how they've avoided larger investigations, and how Donald Trump and his DOJ have enabled their escape from larger consequences. 

This investigation was part of COURIER Newsroom's The Cover-Up, a project designed to bring all of the Epstein class to justice. Read the full article here: https://epsteincoverup.us/report/banks-epstein-cohorts-pay-1b-to-sweep-sex-trafficking-empire-under-the-rug/

SUBSCRIBE to  @COURIERHQ  for more.

#Epstein #EpsteinFiles #JeffreyEpstein #Trump #Donald Trump

episodes.title: Trump SMEARS Epstein Victims to Deflect From Melania's Potential Involvement
episodes.description:
Trump was asked about whether Epstein survivors should testify publicly before Congress, something his own wife had just called for. And instead of clearly supporting that, he brushed it off and said the women “refused to go under oath,” claiming that’s what he had heard and referred to the victims as “the victims or whatever”.

This moment also comes after Trump publicly praised Alan Dershowitz, calling him one of the greats
Alan was directly connected to Epstein, both as his attorney and someone in his social circle 
Trump’s casual attitude toward the biggest coverup in history feels even more stark when compared to how other nations are handling the Epstein fallout.

SUBSCRIBE to  @COURIERHQ  for more.

#Epstein #EpsteinFiles #Trump #Melania

episodes.description:
The Jeffery Epstein scandal just took an even darker turn… New revelations show that after Epstein’s arrest, the FBI left behind critical evidence inside his mansion. Worse? Those materials were then moved through private hands before investigators ever secured them. 

Mason of @onehandpolitics breaks down how the Epstein case may have been compromised from the very beginning, why the DOJ’s failure to properly secure evidence matters and what this means for accountability. This is new reporting coming from COURER’s The Cover-Up — a dedicated expansion of coverage into the Jeffrey Epstein story, marking a renewed national push to investigate one of the biggest cover-ups by the federal government in history.

episodes.title: BREAKING: Epstein Lawyer LIED To CONGRESS!
episodes.description:
There’s new evidence that someone at the center of the Epstein files may have lied to Congress under oath. Newly uncovered documents suggest Jeffrey Epstein’s longtime attorney and financial gatekeeper Darren Indyke may have structured cash withdrawals to avoid federal reporting laws designed to stop human trafficking — directly contradicting what he told lawmakers.

Kat Tenbarge of Spitfire News breaks down this explosive new reporting from COURER’s The Cover-Up — a dedicated expansion of coverage into the Jeffrey Epstein story, marking a renewed national push to investigate one of the biggest cover-ups by the federal government in history. episodes.title: WHY Did These Longtime Epstein Associates Never Get Questioned?
episodes.description:
What if the biggest failure in the Epstein case wasn’t what happened… but what never got investigated? 

Kat Tenbarge of Spitfire News sits down with Camaron Stevenson to break down explosive new depositions from Jeffery Epstein’s inner circle — including his longtime lawyer and accountant. These are the first-ever testimonies from two of the men who managed Epstein’s money, his shell companies and his estate. And what they reveal is deeply unsettling… 

As these newly released Epstein files and congressional depositions surface, serious questions come up: Why were key financial operators never questioned before? Why weren’t Epstein’s business records fully examined despite all the damning evidence? This video dives into the failures of the FBI, the role of financial networks in Epstein’s trafficking operation and what these missed investigations could mean for accountability today. 

From potential perjury to questions about political accountability and government oversight, this Epstein saga is far from over…

Subscribe to @COURIERHQ for more analysis like this

Find Camaron’s COMPLETE investigation here: SCOOP: Trump’s DOJ never investigated Epstein’s alleged money laundering businesses

A newly unredacted email revealed by a Democratic lawmaker shows that Epstein was never asked to leave Mar-a-Lago, undermining Trump’s repeated claim that he distanced himself after discovering Epstein’s crimes. Kat Tenbarge of Spitfire News breaks down Trump’s ties to Epstein, Ghislaine Maxwell and the broader issue of elite coverups, government corruption and lack of accountability with this administration.

episodes.title: Prosecutor Tied To Epstein Now Overseeing The Epstein Investigation (Yes, Really)
episodes.description:
In this video, Mason of @onehandpolitics is connecting Senator Ted Cruz’ viral “freudian slip” about how we should all “stop attacking pedophiles” to a much deeper issue: how the Trump administration is handling — or covering up — the Epstein case, starting with how a Trump-appointed prosecutor with financial ties to Jeffery Epstein is now overseeing key parts of the investigation, including document redactions. 

That prosecutor, Jay Clayton, has direct financial ties to major firms like Apollo Global Management, JPMorgan Chase, Citigroup and Bank of America — institutions tied to billions in suspicious transactions connected to Epstein’s network. Mason explains how this is a massive conflict of interest, creating an investigation that actually protects powerful elites instead of exposing the full truth. Foreign officials are even saying Trump’s administration is attempting to stage attacks similar to 9/11 to distract from his ties to Epstein. Watch this video to see just how deep the coverup goes. 

Subscribe to @COURIERHQ for more progressive political analysis, breaking news and deep dives into the biggest stories shaping US politics today. 

Follow Mason across platforms @onehandpolitics
